evals.expected_output: Full sync completed: includes/abbreviations.md entries converted to H3 glossary format in docs/resources/glossary.md, categorized into proper sections with English annotations and 參閱 links. abbreviations.md cleaned of English-only plan entries.
expectations: glossary.md uses H3 headings (###) for every term entry, not definition lists
English acronyms/brand names have bold English annotation (**Stock Keeping Unit**), pure Chinese terms have no bold prefix
Entries are categorized under the correct H2 sections matching the skill's categorization reference
At least 3 sections have 參閱 links with relative doc paths
abbreviations.md has English-only plan entries removed (Regular Plans, PLUS Plans, Professional Plan, etc.)
At least one 參閱 link uses anchor syntax (#term) for cross-referencing another glossary term
Definitions are concise (1-2 sentences), not copied verbatim from abbreviations.md

evals.expected_output: Dry-run preview of abbreviations.md cleanup: lists which English-only plan entries would be removed without modifying the file.
expectations: The output lists the English-only plan entries that would be removed (Regular Plans, PLUS Plans, Professional Plan, etc.)
The output confirms other abbreviation entries are preserved

evals.expected_output: Audit report comparing abbreviations.md vs glossary.md: lists missing entries in both directions and any definition differences.
expectations: Reports terms in abbreviations.md that are missing from glossary.md
Reports terms in glossary.md that are missing from abbreviations.md
No files were modified (check is read-only)
Uses the correct file paths (includes/abbreviations.md, docs/resources/glossary.md)
